project_title: JA Future Skills Workshop Facilitator (5 Mar 2025)
project_description: Facilitate a workshop for Secondary School Students to polish their work-related skills

organization.name: Junior Achievement Hong Kong
organization.description: Junior Achievement Hong Kong (JA HK) is one of the 100+ members of JA Worldwide, and a leading provider of Other Learning Experiences in Hong Kong. Through hands-on, immersive learning in career readiness, entrepreneurship and financial health, JA programs enable young people to learn the world of work from the first-hand experience of business volunteers. Since our establishment in 2001, we have engaged the support of over 28,000 business volunteers from some 700 companies to serve more than 420,000 students from over 600 schools. Visit www.jahk.org for more details and updates about us and our programs.

what_we_need: A briefing session will be arranged around 1 week prior to the workshop (date, time TBC)
Lead a group of secondary school students to learn through games, provide career/ personal growth advice
This workshop will be hosted in Wah Yan College on 5 Mar 2025 (Wed) 2:00pm - 3:45pm
Volunteers with some working experiences are preferred (mentor training will be provided)
Each workshop will be around 120 students and each volunteer will be working with 5-6 students
project_details.background: It is a three-year partnership with 26 Secondary Schools to provide career and life planning support to 10000+ students.
project_details.what_we_have: All program materials will be provided by JA and a volunteer briefing session will be arranged prior to the start of the program.
project_details.why_important: It is one of the projects under the JA Career Readiness Pillar.
